reviews.review_description: The V3 version has a problem with the cleaning cosmetics because when I bought the fly mask for the first time and when I have it on right after, the cosmetic will completely block my vision and I will not have the ability to see and I cant reach the mods and wardrobe well because I cant see so can you please fix this because I cant even play the game anymore and this might happen to everyone that buys the fly mask, or this might just be me. If you see this just remember to fix this error, or mistake but mostly everything else is good.

This game is pretty good. There is a mod menu, but it’s really big and it isn’t not that much mods, though if you go in city, there is some cosmetics with a fake rainbow stick, but that one doesn’t work because when you jump, you can see it on the bottom of your body and some cosmetics don’t work, but yeah, it’s not that good ￼

developer_response.body:
Hey. Im sorry to here it the fake stick dosent work. This should be fixed now. Please update your game. Thanks! 
-Kingsvr

reviews.review_description: first of all it takes so long to load i really like 20 minutes or even 40 every time and lobbies won't load it's so stupid because it won't let me use any mods and don't get started on how annoying these lobbies are when i finally get a lobby to load after 3 minutes my game crashes L game
First the game was good now it’s really bad now there’s like all this and that that I dislike and the part where you have to go up to go to the mod board

i was playing alone and it was two guys a cowboy and a wing guy so the cowboy guy showed the fingerpainter ilustrator and admin one i searched in city and i saw was nothing literaly i saw three spaces then at the pay thing i put it and it say error nothing was buyed

developer_response.body:
Hey. Im sorry to here it says error when buying cosemtic! This should be fixed now. Please update your game. Thanks! 
-Kingsvr
